heading: Restrictions
label: 70507 Restrictions
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70507(a)36:582., §§ 9, 10, 12, .Aug. 24, 1954, ch. 91168 Stat. 79970507(b)36:580.70507(c)36:579(a) (words before last comma).70507(d)36:579(b).70507(e)36:579(a) (words after last comma).In subsection (a), the words “any shares of” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (b)(1), the words “directly or indirectly” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (c), the word “income” is substituted for “net earnings” for consistency in the revised title.In subsection (d), the words “or advance” are added in 2 places for consistency in the subsection.

Amendments2025— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section set out restrictions on the corporation relating to stock and dividends, political activities, distribution of income, and loans and provided for immunity from liability.Pub. L. 119–57
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70507(a)36:582., §§ 9, 10, 12, .Aug. 24, 1954, ch. 91168 Stat. 79970507(b)36:580.70507(c)36:579(a) (words before last comma).70507(d)36:579(b).70507(e)36:579(a) (words after last comma).In subsection (a), the words “any shares of” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (b)(1), the words “directly or indirectly” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (c), the word “income” is substituted for “net earnings” for consistency in the revised title.In subsection (d), the words “or advance” are added in 2 places for consistency in the subsection.

Amendments2025— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section set out restrictions on the corporation relating to stock and dividends, political activities, distribution of income, and loans and provided for immunity from liability.Pub. L. 119–57

children.heading: .—Stock and Dividends
children.label: a .—Stock and Dividends
children.text: The corporation may not issue stock or declare or pay a dividend.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The activities, funds, income, and property of the corporation may not be used to carry on political activity or attempt to influence legislation.

children.heading: .—No contribution, support, or participation
children.label: 2 .—No contribution, support, or participation
children.text: The corporation or a director or officer in the corporate capacity of the director of officer may not contribute to, support, or participate in any political activity or in any manner attempt to influence legislation.1So in original. Probably should be “or”.1

children.heading: Distribution of Income or Assets.—
children.label: c Distribution of Income or Assets.—
B
children.text: reimbursement for expenses incurred in undertaking the corporation’s business, to officers, directors, or members.

children.label: A
children.text: prevent the award of a grant to a Federal Bar Association chapter of which an officer, director, or member may be a member; or

children.label: B
children.text: prevent the payment of reasonable compensation to the corporation’s employees for services undertaken on behalf of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Loans
children.label: d .—Loans
children.text: The corporation may not make a loan to a director, officer, member, or employee.

children.heading: .—Immunity From Liability
children.label: e .—Immunity From Liability
children.text: Members and private individuals are not liable for the obligations of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Claim of Governmental Approval or Authority
children.label: f .—Claim of Governmental Approval or Authority

children.text: may not claim congressional approval or the authority of the United States Government for any of its activities; and
